response:
* The artist required four distinct hues to cover the forty-eight small tiles for the fresco.
* Since one bottle covers ten tiles, the painter needed five containers of each color to finish.
The total number of tiles is forty-eight in this grand design.
Each hue must be applied to every single tile on the wall.
Five bottles of one color cover fifty tiles which is enough.
The work is done but hell is the seventh word here.
Civic is a word that reads the same forward and back.
